questions.question: Where is Jesse Pollak moving a Farcaster mainnet validator to help onboard international node operators?
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak stated on 2026-05-01 that they are moving a testnet node and then a mainnet validator to a different continent to pave the way for geo-diverse operators.

questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak reported that snapchain mainnet shard 1 halted at approximately 32M height.
